title: French-Style Toasted Baguette
description: A simple French-inspired toasted baguette recipe, perfect for a quick snack or side dish.
instructions: Slice the baguette into 1-inch (2.5 cm) thick slices.
Arrange the baguette slices on a baking sheet in a single layer.
Melt the butter and brush it evenly onto each baguette slice.
Sprinkle the Russian bread crumbs over the baguette slices.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the baguette is toasted golden brown.
